researchResults.title: Insights behind Kinisi’s acquisition by Bear Robotics
researchResults.description:
Brennand Pierce, founder and CEO of Kinisi Robotics, discusses the company's approach to physical AI and its acquisition by Bear Robotics.

The post Insights behind Kinisi’s acquisition by Bear Robotics appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: MBody AI expands service robotics operations to eleven states and Canada
researchResults.description:
MBody AI has deployed its hardware-agnostic Orchestrator platform to Florida and California, with a pilot in Ontario.

The post MBody AI expands service robotics operations to eleven states and Canada appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: BMW Group deploys Figure 03 humanoid after tests with previous version
researchResults.description:
The Figure 02 robot supported the production of more than 30,000 BMW X3 vehicles over 11 months in South Carolina.

The post BMW Group deploys Figure 03 humanoid after tests with previous version appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: AGIBOT produces 15,000th robot, marking a milestone in embodied AI deployment
researchResults.description:
AGIBOT has rolled out 15,000 wheeled semi-humanoid robots as it moves from embodied AI from development and production to deployment.

The post AGIBOT produces 15,000th robot, marking a milestone in embodied AI deployment appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Advantages of hypoid gearing over worm, bevel and bevel-planetary
researchResults.description:
Right-angle gearing often requires engineers to compromise between torque capacity and mechanical efficiency. Hypoid gearing offers a balance of mechanical efficiency, load-carrying capability, and single-stage ratio range.

The post Advantages of hypoid gearing over worm, bevel and bevel-planetary appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
researchResults.description: OKX is bringing together payments, identity and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

researchResults.title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
researchResults.description: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

researchResults.title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
researchResults.description: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

researchResults.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
researchResults.description: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

researchResults.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
researchResults.description: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.
